revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from alternative name
  |name=From an alternative name
  |from=a title that is another name or identity such as an alter ego, a nickname, or a synonym of the target, or of a name associated with the target{{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}| (in this case, the more common name is: ''{{{1|{{{of}}}}}}'')}}
  |info=** This redirect leads to the title in accordance with the naming conventions for [[WP:common names|common names]] to aid searches and writing.  It is [[WP:NOTBROKEN|not necessary]] to replace these redirected links with a [[WP:piped link|piped link]].
** If this redirect is an incorrect name for the target, then {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should be used instead.
  |all category=Redirects from alternative names
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: impoting nglish ikipdia tmplats
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from alternative name
  |name=From an alternative name
  |from=a title that is another name or identity such as an alter ego, a nickname, or a synonym of the target, or of a name associated with the target{{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}| (in this case, the more common name is: ''{{{1|{{{of}}}}}}'')}}
  |info=** This redirect leads to the title in accordance with the naming conventions for [[WP:common names|common names]] to aid searches and writing.  It is [[WP:NOTBROKEN|not necessary]] to replace these redirected links with a [[WP:piped link|piped link]].
** If this redirect is an incorrect name for the target, then {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should be used instead.
  |all category=Redirects from alternative names
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

  |info=** This redirect leads to the title in accordance with the naming conventions for [[WP:common names|common names]] to aid searches and writing.  It is [[WP:NOTBROKEN|not necessary]] to replace these redirected links with a [[WP:piped link|piped link]].

It is [[WP:NOTBROKEN|not necessary]] to replace these redirected links with a [[WP:piped link|piped link]]. ** If this redirect is an incorrect name for the target, then {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should be used instead. |all category=Redirects from alternative names }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from alternative name |name=From an alternative name |from=a title that is another name or identity such as an alter ego, a nickname, or a synonym of the target, or of a name associated with the target{{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}| (in this case, the more common name is: ''{{{1|{{{of}}}}}}'')}} |info=** This redirect leads to the title in accordance with the naming conventions for [[WP:common names|common names]] to aid searches and writing. It is [[WP:NOTBROKEN|not necessary]] to replace these redirected links with a [[WP:piped link|piped link]]. ** If this redirect is an incorrect name for the target, then {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should be used instead. |all category=Redirects from alternative names }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from alternative name |name=From an alternative name |from=a title that is another name or identity such as an alter ego, a nickname, or a synonym of the target, or of a name associated with the target{{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}| (in this case, the more common name is: ''{{{1|{{{of}}}}}}'')}} |info=** This redirect leads to the title in accordance with the naming conventions for [[WP:common names|common names]] to aid searches and writing. It is [[WP:NOTBROKEN|not necessary]] to replace these redirected links with a [[WP:piped link|piped link]]. ** If this redirect is an incorrect name for the target, then {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should be used instead. |all category=Redirects from alternative names }}<noinclude>
